memory:memory/2026-02-24.md:216:239.snippet: ## Lesson Learned 21:16 — gateway config.patch triggers silent disconnect - Used `gateway config.patch` to apply compensating controls (elevated.enabled, exec.ask) - This tool triggers an internal SIGUSR1 restart — same problem as raw launchctl/openclaw gateway restart - JT got disconnected and had to manually restart the gateway - **Fix applied:** AGENTS.md, SECURITY.md, MEMORY.md all updated to explicitly ban `gateway config.patch` and `gateway config.apply` alongside the other banned restart methods - **Correct workflow for config changes:** Edit `~/.openclaw/openclaw.json` directly → then run restart script ## Heartbeat 22:00 EST ### Status Check - All crons: ✅ healthy - Gateway: ✅ bac
